query:
SELECT t.TABLE_NAME, 
  CASE WHEN c.COLUMN_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS updatedAt' ELSE 'MISSING updatedAt' END as status
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES t
LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c 
  ON c.TABLE_SCHEMA = t.TABLE_SCHEMA 
  AND c.TABLE_NAME = t.TABLE_NAME 
  AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'updatedAt'
WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LS6oXFmEKtYAwQA.root --database cRTBYDQNffnDPa87zbUz9b --execute 
SELECT t.TABLE_NAME, 
  CASE WHEN c.COLUMN_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS updatedAt' ELSE 'MISSING updatedAt' END as status
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES t
LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c 
  ON c.TABLE_SCHEMA = t.TABLE_SCHEMA 
  AND c.TABLE_NAME = t.TABLE_NAME 
  AND c.COLUMN_NAME = 'updatedAt'
WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME;
